figures.caption: Table 1: Performance comparison of RPORec and baselines. Boldface denotes the highest performance, and underline indicates the second-best performance. “*” indicates the statistically significant improvements (i.e., two-sided t-test with p < 0.05) over the second-best baseline.
Figure 1: Overview of RPORec. The full structure of RPORec is depicted in (d) with detailed Rechead structure in (c). The optimization processes of stage I and II are illustrated in (a) and (b).
Figure 3: Case study on reasoning CoT quality.
Figure 5: Online deployment architecture of RPORec.
